items.text: Describe the board-level (or equivalent) oversight of water-related risks and opportunities.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Board/committee charter or governance policy document covering water stewardship oversight.

items.text: Describe management's role in assessing and managing water-related issues, including reporting frequency to the board.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Management structure document, meeting minutes, or reporting cadence record.

items.text: Describe the process used to identify, assess, and prioritize water-related risks across owned and operated assets.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Water risk assessment methodology document or basin risk screening report.

items.text: Disclose any substantive water-related risks identified with the potential for significant business impact.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Risk register extract or facility-level water stress assessment.

items.text: Describe how water-related risks and opportunities have influenced business strategy and financial planning.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Strategy document, capital allocation record, or board presentation referencing water.

items.text: Disclose water-related targets, including scope, boundary, base year, and target year.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Board-approved target statement or public commitment document.

items.text: Report progress against active water-related targets for the current reporting period.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Progress report comparing current-period performance to the stated target.

items.text: Report total water withdrawal by source for the reporting period.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Water utility bill or meter log covering the reporting period.

items.text: Report total water discharge and consumption for the reporting period.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Wastewater discharge record for the reporting period.

items.text: Report effluent water quality data and the methodology used to assess pollutant reduction.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Water quality lab report with influent/effluent TSS, Total-N, and Total-P.

items.text: Indicate whether reported water figures have received third-party verification or assurance, and to what standard.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Third-party assurance statement or verification certificate.

items.text: Describe engagement with suppliers on water-related requirements or assessments.
items.requiredEvidenceHint: Supplier water risk assessment or engagement record.

items.text: Describe engagement with local communities on water access, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH).
items.requiredEvidenceHint: WASH access record or community engagement report.

Priya Nair
Section 1

Executive Summary

This report presents the Positive Water Impact (PWI) assessment for the reporting period based exclusively on uploaded and verified evidence. All scores are derived from the Hydris Water Stewardship Methodology (3 Pillars × 3 Dimensions). No values are estimated or fabricated.
